arts.ttl: Liverpool ace who's been benched 17 times 'reason they're top' as Jamie Carragher put down
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has been slammed for saying the level of goalkeeping in the Premier League is at an all-time low, with Liverpool's own second-choice stopper being a shining example of why he's wrong

arts.sum: Villa starting XI: Martinez, Garcia, Disasi, Mings, Digne, Tielemans, McGinn, Asensio, Rogers, Rashford, Watkins. Unai Emery has named his Aston Villa starting XI to face Liverpool in the Premier League this evening.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa v Liverpool: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 7.30pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Top scorers | Football Daily | Email Will I am not 100% sure how Liverpool will line up in attack. I am working on the assumption that Szoboszlai will be behind Jota and Salah. Naturally, I suspect I will be very wrong. Some pre-match Slot. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Journalist insists Liverpool still want player – Arne Slot wants him at Anfield
arts.sum: Arne Slot wants to sign Feyenoord defender David Hancko, who could be the long-term successor to Virgil van Dijk at Liverpool. That’s according to journalist Süleyman Öztürk, who is full of praise for the defender today in comments relayed by FR 12. Hancko has a growing reputation in Europe after impressing for the Dutch side The post Journalist insists Liverpool still want player – Arne Slot wants him at Anfield appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher told he's wrong as Liverpool squad player hailed as 'reason they're top'
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has been put in his place after slamming the standard of goalkeeping in the Premier League, with Liverpool's own second-choice stopper a shining example of why he's wrong

arts.ttl: FSG will be 'secretly delighted' as Liverpool using Barcelona as 'Trojan horse' in £266m masterplan
Marcus Rashford behaviour speaks volumes as Man Utd 'mistake' verdict questioned
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has shown signs of what he can do since joining Aston Villa on loan from Man Utd - but a former player believes it's too early to start making snap judgements A former Manchester United player has warned it's too early to say whether letting Marcus Rashford leave for Aston Villa was a mistake by the Old Trafford club.
